title: canarium dichotomum
intro: Canarium dichotomum, also known as the Pili tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. It is valued for its edible nuts, seeds, and timber. The medicinal properties of the Pili tree include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions such as fever, wounds, and digestive issues. The tree's seeds and nuts can be used in herbal preparations such as tea, oil, and capsule form, which can be used to promote health benefits such as improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function.
